series_metadata.series_description: Customer survey reports of MCOs. This is a survey of how well a Managed Care Organization performed its duties.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Surveys from 2008 and prior to be held for 2 years in office; 15 years at Records Center. Surveys from 2009 and later to be held for 30 days after uploading to UDS and image is confirmed, then shredded ; Electronic: Surveys from 2009 and later to be held for 9 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
